## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX Labs demo for HubSpot's Aja Frost to explore a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**HubSpot's AEO Challenge:** HubSpot's AEO (AI Engine Optimization) is at a "B" maturity level. Key pain points are tracking visibility changes for high-value queries, connecting visibility to actions, and balancing content volume with quality.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**GrowthX's "Context Engineering" Approach:** GrowthX builds content engines by deeply understanding a client's context (product, audience, strategy) and using it to engineer high-quality content at scale, often integrating with product APIs for superior user value.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**The Code-First Workflow Engine:** GrowthX's core differentiator is a code-based workflow engine (open-sourcing next month). This enables complex, multi-agent pipelines (e.g., a 77-minute research agent) that low-code tools like AirOps cannot handle, ensuring superior quality and fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content Strategy:** GrowthX avoids "shallow" programmatic content, which was penalized in the December Google update. Their strategy is to "productize" content by integrating it with client APIs and proprietary data, creating a superior user experience that algorithms reward.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot's AEO Challenges

  - [**Maturity:** "B" grade, but "A" when graded on a curve.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Current Tooling:**](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Technical:** XFunnel (source of truth), Botify, custom bot-specific infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Content:** In-house tooling for mass page creation, AirOps for blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Primary Pain Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Difficult to isolate visibility changes for high-value queries.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Attribution:** Connecting visibility changes to specific actions.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Quality vs. Volume:** Balancing the need for high-quality, unique content with the demand for scale.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### GrowthX's "Context Engineering" Approach

  - [**Core Philosophy:** Become the "best resource" for an audience by deeply understanding their pain points and use cases, then building an engine to deliver the highest-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Methodology:**](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
    1.  [**Context:** Deeply understand the client's company, product, market, and audience.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
    2.  [**Strategy:** Use context to prioritize opportunities (topics, keywords) based on competitive gaps, brand mentions, and persona needs.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
    3.  [**Execution:** Deploy custom, code-based workflows with human oversight to deliver content.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
    4.  [**Optimization:** Ingest signals to prioritize expanding surface area vs. improving existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Key Principle:** "Marketing as context engineering." High-quality context is the foundation for high-quality output.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### The Code-First Workflow Engine

  - [**Problem with Low-Code Tools (e.g., AirOps):** Low-code tools cannot handle the complexity required for deep research and fact-checking. A single complex workflow can break the system or run for days.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=2390.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A code-based workflow engine built on a file system and coding agents.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [**Research Supervisor Agent:** A multi-agent system that plans research, uses deep research APIs, and has an LLM "judge" to evaluate quality against client context.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
      - [**Knowledge Base Integration:** Ingests client data (e.g., Webflow's docs) into a graph RAG (Neo4j) for superior semantic retrieval over standard vector databases.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
      - [**Human-in-the-Loop:** Strategists and editors provide calibration and feedback to address failure modes, ensuring quality.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - **Example (Biologica):** For a healthcare client, the engine uses proprietary medical databases and annotates every medical claim for doctor review, reducing review time to \<15 minutes per article.

### Programmatic Content Strategy & Algo Updates

  - [**December Google Update:** The update penalized "shallow" programmatic content (e.g., low-value listicles), not programmatic content itself.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Strategy:** "Productize" content by integrating it with client APIs or proprietary data to create a superior user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [**Example (Lovable):** A templates library built with their API allows users to "create your own" from a template, accelerating time to value.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Example (Ramp):** A per diem calculator page provides a functional tool, not just static text.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Focusing on user value aligns with Google's long-term goals. While traffic may fluctuate, the strategy builds a resilient, high-quality asset.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aja Frost:** Sync with Adam Coccari to define next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [**Aja Frost:** Provide feedback to GrowthX Labs on a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/cU7zx59RqsBoAA53VUsEasrdiL6iUKga?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
